reviews.review_description: This is a great experience that allows you to easily create puzzles using your own images.   Interacting with the pieces seems intuitive and you can easily zen out for hours at a time.   I like the fact that you can change the puzzle scale on the fly.  I wish that they would raise the zoom level beyond 150% and allow pieces to be as large as the player!   Not really a gripe, I just wander what it would be like.

reviews.review_title: A+ showcase of what makes MR special
reviews.review_description: Everything about this game is so well thought out and designed. Love the multiplayer capabilities, especially co-location, and it’s so incredibly intuitive to pick up and play— love showing it to VR newbies !

This is already good.   I hope the shop brings a great variety.

When will the shop 
open please?

Really impressed with the customizations available to users between gameplay, puzzles, and local/online multiplayer.  Being able to upload an image and build a puzzle is awesome.  

Did run into some issues.  Sometimes takes a few tries to get it to boot up on Quest Pro.  Also, the tutorial window is really low resolution compared to everything else.

Feels incredibly fluid to switch between hands and controllers and hearing the clicks when you connect pieces is so satisfying! Need to get friends to try out the multiplayer, but very solid single player experience so far. Excited to see where this goes!
I always have a blast doing puzzles based off of my own images. Great app and wonderful growing community of Jigsaw Night puzzlers!
